name: Culp for Congress
subject: I'm Sick of this S***. Aren't You?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BhCFYt&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9tuy4s&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/d14c07b4-ab5c-4532-a9bf-c07ea7bc01bc.png]

I'm So Over Weak Republicans...

I'm not sure if you saw the most recent TDS outburst from Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Dan Newhouse, and Jaime Herrera-Beutler this week, but I'm getting sick and tired of the left ignoring the complete collapse of our country while they waste time on commissions, fake news attacks, and pandering to the wackos on the left who are worried about their pro-nouns.

I'm willing to bet you're tired of hearing about it too.

Usually, I don't go off on random rants on social media and Youtube, but this week 35 "Republicans"--including Dan Newhouse and Beutler--joined Nancy Pelosi and those bent on destroying America and the America First movement by voting to set up a Commission to investigate the events that took place on January 6, 2021, at the US Capitol Building.

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/1101f79a-aced-4831-a9a9-3e7b2a17627b.jpg] [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SrPA4u&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EGTTMA4&]

A couple of days ago, I decided to get a few things off my chest. I believe, as the person running to be your next Congressman from Washington's 4th Congressional District, you deserve to know where I stand on these types of shenanigans from the globalists and the left. This commission serves one purpose and one purpose alone: To blame President Trump and America First patriots like you for what happened at the US Capitol and then use those findings as fodder for their 2022 re-election campaigns.

How pathetic is Newhouse? He would side with the enemies of this great nation just because he wants to paint us--you and me--as radicals in order to save his skin in the next election. It makes me wonder, "Can someone in Washington DC please just do their job?"

Well, I have news for Newhouse, Beutler, and the other 33 Republican clowns who voted with the radical left against the American people. This won't work.We know what they're up to. The gig is up and they've been caught.

As we approach the end of May and kick things off in June, we need to finish strong and send a message to Newhouse and the other leftist Republicans. I need to hear from you and I need your financial support as we catch up to the $700,000 Newhouse already hasin the bank. The establishment globalists are scared to death because they heard all of our voices loud and clear in 2020 and they know Newhouse will lose in 2022.

WILL YOU PLEASE CHIP IN $25! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SrPA6r&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyJCFcT&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=BhCFYt&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESgFFyD&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=BhCFYt&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJTMJSy&pt=change_details] at any time.
Powered by: https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=RDxFI&u=Q96gS&z=EJ2dC2i&

| | We’re just a handful of days away from the final fundraising deadline of the primary and things are going horribly wrong, Derek.

Right after Glenn Youngkin won the Republican nomination and was endorsed by Donald Trump, we expected donors to step up. **And at first, the response was incredible. But now, there’s barely anything coming in.**

**Just look at this graph I pulled from ActBlue:** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29622856/286985183/-2023814932?refcode=20210523_EW_5BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGRjYjc2NS1kNWJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D0j810ln9VMROaluprIaWCYdBaxJK1lJ7NIaGw1qBq0=)
---
Derek, this is the FINAL fundraising deadline of the primary. We have to finish strong so we can win and go toe-to-toe with Glenn Youngkin and his $75 million warchest.

**[We’ve set a goal of finding 10,000 donors before midnight on Thursday. As of today, we’re still 3,888 short. Can I count on you to help close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29622858/286985184/-2023814932?refcode=20210523_EW_5BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGRjYjc2NS1kNWJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D0j810ln9VMROaluprIaWCYdBaxJK1lJ7NIaGw1qBq0=)**

Thanks,

Ellie Warner

Terry for VA

Right after Glenn Youngkin won the Republican nomination and was endorsed by Donald Trump, we expected donors to step up. And at first, the response was incredible. But now, there’s barely anything coming in. Just look at this graph I pulled from ActBlue: | = Derek, this is the FINAL fundraising deadline of the primary. We have to finish strong so we can win and go toe-to-toe with Glenn Youngkin and his $75 million warchest. = Thanks, Ellie Warner Finance Director Terry for VA = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Marco Lopez
subject: I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona, but I'm going to need you with me to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29628355/287000442/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkNjhmMy1kZmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wi87O7SLzvTCcYqY2kWZLFauvDX71A6IezRrS5OxnYI=)
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to become one of the 2,500 Founding Donors we need to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona's governorship blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
My story is the story of Arizona: I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents taught me that _la promesa_ of Arizona is that if you work hard and dream big, anything is possible.

Throughout my life, I've been blessed to live that promise – and I've dedicated my life to making it real for others. From being elected mayor of my hometown to serving in the Obama administration, I've always sought to bring people together to solve big problems.
But with the failed leadership of Republicans like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey – politicians who would rather divide us and spread lies about the 2020 election than tackle the real problems facing our state – that promise is no longer being met. **I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you're ready for a change, I have to ask: **
**[Will you give $5 or more now to become a Founding Donor of our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29628357/287000448/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkNjhmMy1kZmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wi87O7SLzvTCcYqY2kWZLFauvDX71A6IezRrS5OxnYI=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29628359/287000450/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkNjhmMy1kZmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wi87O7SLzvTCcYqY2kWZLFauvDX71A6IezRrS5OxnYI=)
Becoming a Founding Donor of our campaign is about more than a donation – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for _all_ our people.

Your support is essential to power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – a state that delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but that _still_ has a Republican governor. I know we can change that, and I'm not alone:
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a _toss-up – _and now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power.
We can flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical midnight deadline – to become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29628362/287000453/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkNjhmMy1kZmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wi87O7SLzvTCcYqY2kWZLFauvDX71A6IezRrS5OxnYI=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Why we’ve been reaching out for donations a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

**May End-of-Month Deadline: 5/31**
**Goal: 3,000 Donations**
**Suggested donation: $3**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29629144/287003663/-347207331?refcode2=2024baed-e0bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210523-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDI0YmFlZC1lMGJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ssvpKXDJzU8fdXKoFCsLFCA_e4QkcqhA543W5DHiKus=)**
Hi team,
We know that we’ve been reaching out asking for donations a lot. That’s because this isn’t any ordinary Senate race.
Pennsylvania is slated to be **the most competitive** Senate race of 2022. And the stakes are high: because Democrats hold only 50 seats right now, it’s absolutely necessary that we do everything we can to win here if we are going to protect and expand our Senate Majority.

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. name: Cathy McMorris Rodgers HQ
subject: this needs your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorris Rodgers Win The Future Fund
body:
Cathy isn't wasting time schmoozing rich billionaires like her counterparts on the radical left. Instead, she is hard at work ensuring their deep pockets don't ruin this country forever.

Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers is working tirelessly to defend our Conservative values from the radical left. Her constant effort is an inspiration to her staff and her colleagues.

Rep. McMorris Rodgers is not one to brag about her efforts, but let us fill you in on what she's been working on:
* She has been appointed by Republican leadership to stand up and investigate Big Tech and "woke" CEOs who cancel conservatives yet partner with dictators and communists.

* Calling out Joe Biden and his Administration for the disaster their policies have caused at the southern border.

* Fighting to defend jobs from Democrats' "Green New Deal" in her home state of Washington and around the country.

* Working to REOPEN our country, our schools, and our economy

And SO much more...

In all of this hard work fighting against the radical left, Cathy has gotten behind on her goal for May.

Cathy isn't wasting time schmoozing rich billionaires like her counterparts on the radical left. Instead, she is hard at work ensuring their deep pockets don't ruin this country forever.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: My grandma taught me never to wait for permission to do something meaningful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GODLEWSKI FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey Peter,

It's been over a month since we launched this campaign, and what a whirlwind it's been! We've traveled across the state and talked with Wisconsinites in every part of the state, and I gotta tell you: I am constantly inspired by the stories they share.

Today, I wanted to take the opportunity to tell you a little bit more about my story and why I'm the best candidate to take down Ron Johnson.

I was born in Eau Claire as a fifth-generation Wisconsinite to two public school teachers. Later I was joined by two little sisters (the first two people I could organize). Growing up, my parents instilled in me the value of hard work and standing up for what's right. And I saw them live those values, working hard to make sure we were all taken care of. Every summer during their two weeks off, we would pile in the car to see the National Parks, driving by day and camping at night. I've been to just about every corner of this great country you can visit.

It was my grandmother -- a trailblazer who served in World War II -- who taught me the importance of taking action. I can still hear her telling me, "Sarah, ask for forgiveness, not permission."

It was her voice in my head when I ran for student government even though the boys told me girls didn't do that. And it was that wisdom that got me involved in the fight to expand voting rights in college. When I walked into the Pentagon as a 20-something year old woman meeting with senior military officials on how to save taxpayer dollars, my grandma was with me telling me to tell it like it is and make changes that needed making.

That's also why I set out to save the State Treasurer's office from Republicans like Scott Walker who were hellbent on getting rid of it. I thought we couldn't lose Wisconsin's fiscal watchdog and the voters agreed, saving the office by a wide, bipartisan margin. A few months later, I was sworn in as State Treasurer and we've been busy making needed changes to build back the office. We've lifted a Republican gag order that stopped us from talking about climate change, taken a Wisconsin-first approach with investing taxpayer dollars, and provided record-breaking funding to our school system.

But we can do more. Crushing student debt, rising prescription drug costs, stagnant wages, a changing climate, crumbling infrastructure, and underwhelming investment in our small businesses and communities are all pressing down on working families. Here's the hard truth -- a childhood like I had is getting further and further out of reach for Wisconsin families. That's got to change, and it's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate.

I know a thing or two about winning hard races because I've run Wisconsin statewide campaigns twice -- and won both times. We even won the campaign to save the State Treasurer's office with supermajority -- and that kind of victory just doesn't happen in Wisconsin. That's not because of just me, it's because I know the importance of a grassroots team. The only way we can make change is to do it TOGETHER.

If you think it's time for a change, that it's time to beat Ron Johnson, I hope you'll stick with me in this campaign.

Forward,

Sarah

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today.

CONTRIBUTE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-may-21

If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please contact us here [info@sarahforwisconsin.com] .
PAID FOR BY GODLEWSKI FOR WISCONSIN
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
Sarah relies on this grassroots team to fund her campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c01d85f3-72ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/6885f885-ecbb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODg1Zjg4NS1lY2JiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZL58qDLY2IaJwBhvo1ZNN0qyxfKRB1koTOiwipHCVWA=&id=121241219 .https://www.sarahforwisconsin.com/ [https://www.sarahforwisconsin.com/]

name: Border Updates
subject: We must put our foot down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Friend,

I know we keep writing to you about this subject, but that's because the situation at our southern border is serious.

Just last week Governor Abbott in Texas said that **the state of Texas has seized enough fentanyl at the border to "kill every single person in New York."**

subject: We need Ashley Hinson in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ashley Hinson for Congress
body:
She's a conservative champion
|
---
| | | Friend,

**Strong conservative women like Ashley Hinson are what Congress needs. She 's been shaking things up in DC since Day 1, and she's never backed down in defending Iowans.**

Ashley is one of the toughest leaders I know, and that's exactly why Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the Democratic Party are so afraid of her.

But I have a plan to make Republicans' celebrations completely BACKFIRE. If I can get 1,735 gifts in the door before midnight, I’ll have the resources to launch an immediate response, DEFEND my Democrats, and SAVE our hard-fought Majority. This is the most important ask I’ll ever make of you: Can I count on your $15 before it’s too late? >> I need you to understand: Democrats worked tirelessly to pass Covid relief for millions. And we’ll continue working to tackle voter suppression, the climate crisis, and so much more. But if we let Trump and Republicans’ plan succeed -- we’ll LOSE our House Majority. I promise you this: I’m working day and night to STOP Republicans from stealing the House. But the simple truth is, I can’t do it alone. I’m going to need 1,735 Democrats to rush $15 before midnight to launch my historic defense. Can I count on your $15 right now? >> Chip in $5 now >> [] Chip in $15 now >> [] Chip in $25 now >> [] Chip in $100 now >> [] Chip in another amount now >> [] Thank you, Nancy Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? DONATE [] SHOP [] Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: . Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Team Franchot Digital
subject: Racing the Indy 500 in a Model T
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We’re reaching out to you with an urgent campaign update. Our Campaign Manager has just informed us that we need to redouble our efforts to fund new digital ads.
Digital ads are one of our most effective tools we have in reaching out to Maryland voters. They have a major impact on our ability to communicate our message, and continue building our people-powered movement.
To make sure we can keep our foot on the gas, will you rush a donation to help us keep getting our message out? Your contribution will make a crucial difference in helping us scale up our statewide digital operation in the coming weeks and months.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active]Over the past decade, cutting-edge digital technologies -- including social media, online ads, email platforms, texting, websites, and more -- have completely revolutionized the way that we run campaigns. Barack Obama pioneered the use of digital platforms to make history in 2008. He correctly understood how the internet could be used to connect with voters in new, unique and effective ways.
Now, there’s no going back. To run a campaign in the 2020s without a strong digital strategy is to try racing the Indy 500 in a Model T.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]We don’t know about you, but we’d prefer using the race car.
Obviously, Barack Obama wasn’t the only one who used cutting-edge digital tactics to gain an advantage over the competition. In 2016, the Trump campaign made heavy investments in their digital strategy to devastating effect. As a result, our democracy paid the price over the next four years.
We at Team Franchot understand that we can never allow ourselves to fall behind on digital against any hardcore right-wing opponents -- especially those who want to follow in the footsteps of Donald Trump in both rhetoric and policy. That’s why we’ve been making investments in digital at such an early stage in the race compared to everyone else. And with your help, that’s exactly what we will continue to do.
Anything you can give [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=20.22] is greatly appreciated. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to bring about the change that Maryland needs and deserves.
Stay connected,
Team Franchot Digital
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/15ec9687-79b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed/e40807b7-f0bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDA4MDdiNy1mMGJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mb5DbY4kbUyJtBegdzwRr-kHZRWOofi0ti-YzQltsmQ=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Giffords.org
subject: More celebrations are around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
We’re introducing a **10,000 donation goal** before the end of May so that we can fuel our efforts to pass universal background checks and fight back against the NRA.
Life is returning to a sense of normalcy. And this summer, more people will be gathering for events, families will spend time with their loved ones, and many people will be going back to work in person.
But gun sales are still on the rise, so before summer is in full swing, we want to make sure universal background checks pass in the Senate and are signed into law.
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We’ll put your contribution to work right away in our efforts to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21&amount=3&refcode=em210523-1-subs?t=1&refcode2=132_3935704_6UeDmZ&akid=132%2E3935704%2E6UeDmZ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210523-1-subs&t=14&refcode2=132_3935704_6UeDmZ&akid=132%2E3935704%2E6UeDmZ)**

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210523-1-subs&t=15&refcode2=132_3935704_6UeDmZ&akid=132%2E3935704%2E6UeDmZ)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210523-1-subs&t=19&refcode2=132_3935704_6UeDmZ&akid=132%2E3935704%2E6UeDmZ)**
---
****
This month, during Mother’s Day weekend, there were nine mass shootings across seven states. 16 people died, and 41 were wounded.
Memorial Day, Father’s Day and more celebrations are right around the corner — we don’t need to endure more tragedy as people gather with their loved ones again.
10,000 donations will show the Senate the strength this movement has and just how serious Americans are about passing universal background checks.
Let’s ensure this can be safer for everyone. Thank you for standing with us today and always.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?refcode=em210523-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=132_3935704_6UeDmZ&akid=132%2E3935704%2E6UeDmZ)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=132%2E3935704%2E6UeDmZ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Team Padilla
subject: We’ll keep this quick
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

We know it’s the weekend so we’ll keep this quick. Here's the situation:

Our online fundraising goal for the month of May has us needing about
5,000 individual donations in order to raise what we need to fuel our
reelection effort.

As of this morning, we're at 1,128, so we have some work to do and we need
your help to get back on track.

What do you say?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210523-1-subs&t=1001&refcode2=47_159979_3OMmj0&akid=47%2E159979%2E3OMmj0 ]Can you contribute $3 to help us close our fundraising
gap? We'll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold this
seat and defend our Democratic Senate majority.

Our majority in the Senate is razor thin. We have to win every race in
2022 if we hope to defend our majority. So we are getting started early
here in California and your support this early on will have such a big
impact.

Thank you for all you do to support Alex and this team!

Our very best,

Team Padilla

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?source=em210523-1-subs&t=1002&refcode2=47_159979_3OMmj0&akid=47%2E159979%2E3OMmj0 ]DONATE NOW

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=47%2E159979%2E3OMmj0

name: Colin McCann
subject: Take a look at how Derek's been defending our environment recently:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
| Peter, take a look at how Derek's been defending our environment recently: | **Kilmer Joins Schrier, Simpson in Introducing Bipartisan Legislation to Improve Forest Roads and Protect Waterways, Aquatic Wildlife**
---
**Rep. Kilmer Joins Bipartisan Call For $10B Investment In Coastal Restoration Jobs**
---
**Kilmer, Strickland Re-Launch Puget Sound Recovery Caucus**
---
**US House passes historic public lands bill pledging to protect nearly 3m acres**
---
As someone who grew up on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek has a great appreciation for our natural resources. He's seen first-hand the connection between our environment and our economy.

That's why protecting our environment for future generations, growing green jobs, and combating the threat of climate change have always been top priorities of Derek's. **[But Derek wants to hear from you. Will you take his quick environmental poll today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mmyKKO6pB96kWz6CQMqm3o9NHst-kFT2OHhhMhdaKeE=/YGvEOjupa6p8Lb_NcMfS1-aVw7L7n1adkfgRZVSN3is=?gpsid=50_115_19018&ms=em21_210523_Enviro_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&refcode=em21_210523_Enviro_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210523_Enviro_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Yes

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: Imagine This
body:
Read about how a wholistic approach will begin to fix a broken system.
| | | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=1)
---
| Peter, Imagine a system that is for everyone and treats everyone with equity and respect. It sounds like a pipe dream for most, but not me! I know that we can fix our broken system. We can't just look at one part of the system and expect it to fix every issue. We must take a holistic approach. This means that we have to not only tear down the blue wall, fix the corrections system, our judicial system, education system, and ending poverty. **[We can do this, but we need your help! Could you donate $20 right now to help us win?](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys_C433UR88LflBvk_XikSPVvZIMkgrnJg_YedGav_hKA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=2)** We have to power to end poverty in the next ten years. Let's dig deep into what we can do to fix these systemic issues. **Let's start with our Justice System:** The three components that make up the justice system must all change at once, and we can't fix one piece without fixing the others. Sidebar: Imagine you are looking at a clock with three gears, each moving the hands. Now, look closer and see that they are all missing some of their teeth. If we fix the seconds hand, we realize the other two hands will still be out of sync and will eventually cause the entire clock to be out of sync again. We have to repair the teeth of all the hands simultaneously so that we can set the clock. We have to rethink how our entire justice system works. We have to develop a way to fix how our police do their jobs, how we operate our correctional system, and how our judicial system works. I'm developing how to do this, and I am working on the first step of fixing our police departments. **Fixing Our Police Departments:** I hear the calls for defunding the police departments, and while abolishing the police departments would immediately stop the killings by police, we would have no way of preventing crime. This is why I propose a way to fix our police departments and tear down the blue wall. We have to realize that all police are not bad; many genuinely care about the communities in which they work. There are bad police, which we must root out and remove from our communities. How do we do this? The first step is creating a National Training and Hiring Standard for all police. Making the training for police officers two years, not 4.5 months (Seattle and Tacoma both have 4.5-months of police training). I know what your thinking, training is excellent and all, but what about the police currently on the streets? Will they get to keep their jobs? No, my bill would require that all police officers, regardless of their tenure, be required to complete the required training. The only difference is those police officers who have already completed their academy training will have a more extended period to complete this training but will have a deadline to meet. The next part is to ensure that police don't have a free pass for complaints and miss conduct. To ensure that police are held accountable for their actions, we will require citizen and police review boards. This board will comprise community members and police and will have rules regarding how police misconduct is handled. We must also ensure that police are regularly trained and tested to ensure they remain unbiased and there for the community. To do this, we will instill a mandatory 160 hours of in-service training per year, random drug and polygraph testing, physical agility standards, and regular reviews of complaints and each officer's record. [**Police Reform is step one, but to get this done, we need your support; donate $20 right now to help us secure a victory!**](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys_C433UR88LflBvk_XikSPVvZIMkgrnJg_YedGav_hKA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=3) I know what you're thinking, but you said we had to fix the entire system, not just one piece. You are correct; we have to fix the whole system, so now we will talk about our Corrections System. **Our Corrections system** First, let me start by saying our correction system as it stands today is not built to correct actions; it is set to punish actions. Sidebar: As an adoptive parent, my husband and I had to take about eight classes to care for a child. These classes teach us that when a child makes a mistake or gets in trouble, it is essential to explain what they did wrong and help them make better choices. So let's look at how we can fix our corrections system to fix the wrongdoings rather than simply punishing them. Step one is to end solitary confinement; this cruel punishment can mentally impact a person. Step two is to begin each person's time with a session with a counselor and prepare them for their time in jail or prison. Step three train the corrections officers with more comprehensive training and ensure they know how to deal with incarcerated. Step four Set up each incarcerated person with a job in the facility. This ensures that each person has a purpose and a role in keeping the facility running. But wait, they won't be doing this job for free, and they will be required to be paid minimum wage. Note: Currently, the constitution under the 13th Amendment says you can enslave someone as punishment. We must abolish this wording from the constitution. Step five provide education to each individual. Many incarcerated individuals don't even have a high school diploma. We must change that we need more educated people in our world. For those who do, we will provide them an option for higher education. Step six create a second chance tax incentive program. This means that if a company is willing to hire an individual with a criminal record, regardless of what it is, they will receive a tax credit for each person they hire; Thus allowing a more significant percentage of those incarcerated to start fresh. Step seven develop a transition center for individuals who are being released. Sixty days before an individual is released from jail, they will be moved to a transition center. This center will provide counselors for individuals who need it, career counselors, and even help them get a job and develop budgeting and life skills that they will need when they are released. We can't say that every person who goes through this new system will be fixed, but we have a high degree of certainty that we will lower the number of repeat offenders and lower poverty rates. [**We have laid out the plan to fix two of the systems so far, and we need your help to get this done; donate $20 right now to help us fix a broken system.**](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys_C433UR88LflBvk_XikSPVvZIMkgrnJg_YedGav_hKA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=4) **Now for the big fix, the judicial branch.** Our pledge of allegiance says liberty and justice for all, but currently, that's not the case in our country. There is no liberty without justice, and there is no justice without equity and equality in the system. Let's fix the system together. Let's start by ending mandatory sentencing; this will reduce the number of people forced to go to jail, giving the power back to the judge. Secondly, let's promote and support individuals who are willing to change and correct their mistakes. This means creating education programs, work programs, and even housing, counseling, and assistance. We must also end the requirement of paying for probation. This creates a system that keeps people going back to jail or forces them to go without food or housing. There are many ways we can correct people's mistakes without sending them to jail, and we must explore those options. **We have the ability to make a real difference. With your help, we can fix a broken system and help save many lives.** **Please donate today** | [](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys9Zym1VB-ormXwXr6mDQlvD2IPqIpIJFa5WKCU1IKMEo&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=5 "$5") [$5](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys9Zym1VB-ormXwXr6mDQlvD2IPqIpIJFa5WKCU1IKMEo&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=6)
---
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys15xllNTxwrhTBmlS5ahvR_THi-LT1PMD030Q9T3N-nY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=7 "$10") [$10](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys15xllNTxwrhTBmlS5ahvR_THi-LT1PMD030Q9T3N-nY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=8)
---
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys15xllNTxwrhTBmlS5ahvR9YmJXzsV9_yMpGGrl-N8rk&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=9 "$15") [$15](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys15xllNTxwrhTBmlS5ahvR9YmJXzsV9_yMpGGrl-N8rk&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=10)
---
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys0JqnWfBSetOcZv2ioU69TLuA55TYLRUihOxRgZ55f5E&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=11 "$20") [$20](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztDTX5Gy7hO82fD9vUOTkys0JqnWfBSetOcZv2ioU69TLuA55TYLRUihOxRgZ55f5E&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=12)
---
Nicolaus for U.S. Senate Campaign Team
[](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=13)[www.Nick4WA.com](https://www.nick4wa.com?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=14)

[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3VOJhhOlfNS34J6bd3r1Y4GA2_ravK9BeRX9PGqMLAf&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=16)

You can also keep up with Nicolaus Sleister on [Twitter](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNC3l6O4KvVEpDWJGhNvZIvg&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=19) or [Facebook](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6pbBvsAFXrfU42KzBC5nXK943wDZFUJVIn4QFt2h26S5&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_on_police_reform_01&n=20).

subject: Can you chip in $10 to help fuel our campaign to keep Mark in the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends - we have two very important pieces of information to share with you.
1\. One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a **_six-figure ad buy_** in Arizona attacking Mark.
2\. So we need your help! Our goal in May is to get 50,000 online donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate.
Our deadline ends in just over a week, which means we still have some time left to dig deep and knock this goal out of the park.
**So with our deadline approaching, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of our 50,000 contribution goal, not when we are being targeted by Mitch McConnell and his allies.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210523-1-15&t=1&refcode2=661_6688874_vTxpUW&akid=661%2E6688874%2EvTxpUW)

Team Kelly

She told me that donations have slowed down to the point that she doesn’t think we’ll hit our 10,000 donation goal by Thursday. If that happens, we may have to cut some of our get out the vote efforts in the final days of the primary.

Derek, if you know me, you know I’m an eternal optimist. I told my team that you would never let us fail at such a make-or-break moment. We have to finish this thing strong so we can hit the ground running when we take on Glenn Youngkin.

**[Please, pitch in today and be one of the 10,000 donations we need to hit our goal. I’m counting on this team to pull through for me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29640715/287044202/-2023814932?refcode=20210523_TM_5BJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2EzNDdiMi0xOGJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4X18f86hJ_Xz9Rb-QtyHqEpcYV-_TnIqxAPP5TunOE=)**

\-- Terry \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Ellie Warner**
Subject: Bad news about our final deadline
> Hi Terry,
>
> I’ve got some really bad news about our final finance deadline.
>
> We had set a goal of getting 10,000 donors to pitch in by May 27, which after the surge we saw last week, seemed very achievable.
>
> But right now, we’re seeing donations slowing down, and I honestly don’t know that we’ll be able to make it. We’re still 3,888 donations short, and unless we see a surge in the next couple days, we’re going to be looking at some serious budget cuts right as our get out the vote effort goes into full swing.
>
> We’re going to do what we can to make sure our supporters know just how dire the situation is right now, but we’re in a pretty tight spot. I’ll keep you up to date as we get closer to the 27th.
>
> \-- Ellie

We had set a goal of getting 10,000 donors to pitch in by May 27, which after the surge we saw last week, seemed very achievable. clean_body: | = | | = | | | = Stacey Abrams is RIGHT, folks!! All around the country, our democracy is under attack. Republican legislators are pulling out all the stops to restrict voting rights — from discriminatory voter ID laws to convoluted voter registration processes, and everything in between. This is why we need to fight back, team. Susie Lee is working hard in Congress to support voting rights for ALL Americans, and she needs your help. = | | = | | = | | = Here’s the truth, folks: Republicans know that when we all vote, they lose. That’s why they’re trying so hard to restrict voting — especially for Black Americans. But that’s not how a democracy works. Holding elected office means being accountable to every single constituent — not only the ones you pick and choose. It’s time for voters to start picking their officials, not the other way around. = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for being a champion of democracy, Team Susie | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Punish the RINOs!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
NO to the Dem anti-Trump Commission! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1f575fd61f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Republicans will never achieve our policy goals until we stick together and fight as hard as the Dems do. That's just a fact!

I WILL fight, as I have my whole life!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e935b7bf11&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician. I nearly shocked the political world by coming close to beating him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

You know the reason I got more votes in my district than any Republican ever had? **_I never backed down, and never gave an inch! I took it right to the Dems._**

Apparently, the RINOs in Congress didn't get the message- including some from here in Florida:

_Thirty-five House Republicans on Wednesday voted in favor of a bill to establish a commission to investigate the January 6 attack on the Capitol.

Former President Donald Trump this week urged Republican lawmakers to oppose it, saying in a statement: "**Republicans must get much tougher and much smarter, and stop being used by the Radical Left.** "

The result underscores the ongoing division within the GOP over Trump's role in and influence over the party's direction, with many Republicans who had criticized the former president for his role in the events of January 6 - including Rep. Liz Cheney - breaking ranks to vote in favor of establishing a commission.

The bill passed by a vote of 252-175 and was opposed by GOP leadership, Insider's Grace Panetta and Charles Davis reported._

So, this bill was SO bad, that even McCarthy and McConnell opposed it.

The bill begins:

_To investigate and report upon the facts and causes relating to the January 6, 2021, domestic terrorist attack upon the United States Capitol Complex (hereafter referred to as the ‘‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’’)..._

So, let's get this straight. _To the Dems and the RINOs, a couple of guys from Duck Dynasty and some guy in a buffalo bikini, all unarmed, constitute a "Domestic Terrorist Attack"_... but ACTUAL armed rioters burning and looting thousands of homes and businesses, killing dozens of innocent people, across dozens of cities, that's just fine and dandy?

When Congress excuses some kinds of political violence and tarnishes others, that's a good sign their motivation is political, not truth.

_I'm ashamed and angry that ANY Republicans, much less Floridians (Carlos Gimenez and Maria Salazar) voted for this drivel._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ff989ff077&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**I've been to actual warzones. I've seen an ACTUAL insurrection. You can't have an insurrection without guns. Such an event is usually called a "protest", which is what this was.**__

Look, I don't want to excuse political violence. But I especially don't want to excuse some types and not others. Either violence to influence politics is ok for everyone or ok for no one.

And the "truth commission" of the Dems reeks of political persecution. Already we have seen Constitutional rights abridged by the FBI in their overzealous prosecution of this situation.

For Republicans, this was a "show and tell" moment. We needed to be together to stop this political persecution of our own base. **Instead some woke Republicans joined the Dems, and that's not acceptable. **

**Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We have to assume that any Republicans that vote with the Dems, support their radical agenda. **

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the RINOs from day one!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job!_

I want to go defend America, like I have always done. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1f49a8fb95&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we (the Patriots, because the RINOs are worthless) need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our innocent citizens from political persecution!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d41450a5ee&e=afa21b7626)

---

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---

| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=271e60b282&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Pramila's continued work to push Democrats to go bigger, bolder, and faster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, voters across America delivered Democrats the House, the Senate, and the White House — a clear mandate for transformative change. Now, we must use this historic governing opportunity to go big, bold, and fast in order to deliver for them.
In partnership with a broad coalition of House Democrats from the Congressional Progressive Caucus to the moderates and centrists, Pramila sent a letter to House and Senate leadership as they map out a path to victory on President Biden's infrastructure plan. They weren't afraid to say what we're all thinking:
**If Republicans refuse to work with Democrats on a legislative package that meets the scale of the overlapping crises we face, then we need to do it ourselves — people can '****t wait.**[**If you're with Pramila in this fight, can you chip in $3 or more to our campaign today so we can continue building an unstoppable movement for transformative change?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210523?refcode=em20210523-313&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=313_420207_Ll_N8M&akid=313%2E420207%2ELl_N8M)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210523?refcode=em20210523-313&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=313_420207_Ll_N8M&akid=313%2E420207%2ELl_N8M)**
Here's where things stand: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell has already vowed to oppose President Biden's American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan. That's after 100% of Republicans voted against the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package — while turning around to tout its benefits to voters, no less!
If Congressional Democrats lead with moral clarity to champion and pass President Biden's proposed investments in physical infrastructure, caregiving, housing, and workforce development — all the while pushing harder for health care and the climate-and-worker first standards that Republicans have tried to throw out — we can fundamentally change what’s possible in our communities.
**The risk isn't going too big — it's not going big**** _enough_****.**
[**But it's going to take all of us joining in solidarity with Pramila to mount a powerful show of force against those who seek to compromise away our progress. Help fuel this necessary work by chipping in $3 or more to our campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210523?refcode=em20210523-313&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=313_420207_Ll_N8M&akid=313%2E420207%2ELl_N8M)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210523-313-footer&t=22&refcode2=313_420207_Ll_N8M&akid=313%2E420207%2ELl_N8M)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=313%2E420207%2ELl_N8M)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=313%2E420207%2ELl_N8M)
